message: Run a real orchestrator + worker E2E for IP mctp_assembler_scratch_v5. Use read_pipeline_state first. Then call dispatch_workflow with workflow="contract-reflection", stages=["contract-check"], schedule="serial", exec_mode="orchestrator", run_mode="engineering", model="gpt-5.5". Do not run ssot, fl, cl, rtl, tb, sim, syn, sta, pnr, or any repair loop. After the worker completes, read signoff/contract_check.json and finalize completed only if status is pass, reflection summary is 7/7, and evidence summary is 91/91. If it is not pass, finalize blocked with the owner route.
